sequence.name: billing-payment-sapi-create-payment-intent-sequence

variable.name: errorMsg
variable.expression: ${'Error occurred in claim-sapi for quoteId- ' + params.pathParams.claimId + ' errorMessage- ' + props.synapse.ERROR_MESSAGE + ' errorDetail- ' + props.synapse.ERROR_DETAIL + ' errorCode- ' + string(props.synapse.ERROR_CODE)}
